title: Topic

authorizationScopes.description: The authorization scopes required to subscribe to this topic.

context.description: The business context associated with this topic. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

filterable.description: The indicator of whether this topic is filterable or not.

scope.description: The scope of this topic. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

status.description: The status of this topic. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

supportedPayloads.description: The supported payloads for this topic.

topicId.description: The unique identifier for the topic.

description: A type that describes the details of the topic.
